data.name: WarningComponentModelNotAvailable
data.value: Warning: Could not obtain IComponentModel service.

data.name: WarningThreadedWaitDialogNotAvailable
data.value: Warning: Could not obtain IVsThreadedWaitDialog2 service.

data.name: ErrorProjectReferenceNull
data.value: Project reference is null. Likely a ProjectGroup vstemplate.

data.name: ErrorFailedToInstallPackage
data.value: Failed to install NuGet package: {0}. Error: {1}

data.name: ErrorPackagesFailedToInstall
data.value: The following NuGet packages failed to install: {0}

data.name: ErrorSaveAllProjectsUIThread
data.value: SaveAllProjects must be called on the UI thread.
